annotation_method: Audio transient candidates plus frame-level visual verification. User correction removed a duplicated second-rally early contact and identified the missed late contact around 8.57s.

events.label: right foot touch
events.note: Bag is on/at the extended foot and audio has a transient.

events.label: second foot touch
events.note: Visually closest foot contact in the first rally before the reset.

events.label: floor reset
events.note: Bag is down on the floor after the two-touch rally.

events.label: toe touch
events.note: Clear foot contact near the first audio peak of the rally.

events.label: quick touch
events.note: Quick early touch. The earlier 4.50s candidate was removed as a duplicate of this contact.

events.label: toe touch
events.note: Bag reaches the foot and rebounds upward.

events.label: toe touch
events.note: Foot contact aligns with a strong audio transient.

events.label: toe touch
events.note: Bag is low and close to the foot; audio transient supports contact.

events.label: toe touch
events.note: Visual contact is clearer around 7.10-7.17s; nearby audio candidates bracket it.

events.label: late touch
events.note: Foot sends the bag upward/right; this is not the final contact.

events.label: final touch before drop
events.note: Previously missed late contact; frames around 8.54-8.60s show the bag at the foot before the reset.

events.label: floor reset
events.note: Bag is back down near the floor after the late touch; rally resets here.

events.label: first touch
events.note: Bag reaches the foot and rebounds; audio transient is nearby.

events.label: second touch
events.note: Clear foot contact before the stall setup.

events.label: toe stall
events.note: Audio setup transient is around 12.86s; the bag visibly settles on the foot around 13.10s and remains controlled until roughly 14.20s.
